title: pterocarpus oblongus
intro: Pterocarpus oblongus, also known as the African bloodwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally used in African medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its use in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Pterocarpus oblongus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are often made by steeping the bark, leaves, or roots in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds.
